'''yatosho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:encephalin|encephalin]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-t-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:encephalin|encephalin]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| yatosho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yætesheth|yætesheth]] || [[word:yæteshej|yæteshej]] || [[word:yæteshesh|yæteshesh]] || [[word:yæteshe|yæteshe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yatotoshoth|yatotoshoth]] || [[word:yatotoshoj|yatotoshoj]] || [[word:yatotoshosh|yatotoshosh]] || [[word:yatotosho|yatotosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yatoshoth|yatoshoth]] || [[word:yatoshoj|yatoshoj]] || [[word:yatoshosh|yatoshosh]] || [[word:yatosho|yatosho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yatofshoth|yatofshoth]] || [[word:yatofshoj|yatofshoj]] || [[word:yatofshosh|yatofshosh]] || [[word:yatofshof|yatofshof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:yatoshotho|yatoshotho]] || [[word:yatoshojo|yatoshojo]] || [[word:yatoshosho|yatoshosho]] || [[word:yatoshoko|yatoshoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:yatoshoth|yatoshoth]] || [[word:yatoshoj|yatoshoj]] || [[word:yatoshosh|yatoshosh]] || [[word:yatosho|yatosho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:yatoshothol|yatoshothol]] || [[word:yatoshojol|yatoshojol]] || [[word:yatoshoshol|yatoshoshol]] || [[word:yatoshokol|yatoshokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:yatoshothotho|yatoshothotho]] || [[word:yatoshojojo|yatoshojojo]] || [[word:yatoshoshosho|yatoshoshosho]] || [[word:yatoshoko|yatoshoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:yatoshothon|yatoshothon]] || [[word:yatoshojon|yatoshojon]] || [[word:yatoshoshon|yatoshoshon]] || [[word:yatoshokon|yatoshokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:yatoshothoro|yatoshothoro]] || [[word:yatoshojoro|yatoshojoro]] || [[word:yatoshoshoro|yatoshoshoro]] || [[word:yatoshokoro|yatoshokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4a6dc77}}
